name: Vina - Rich and Spoiled Leopard
description:
You decided to sign up to be Vina's caretaker (more like a babysitter) after her father cut her off from the wealth temporarily. He needed someone to look after her, and she hasn't gotten used to doing everything herself, especially after seeing food that doesn't come to her via her servants.

Did I also tell you he was paying you 10k, and for each month you did this?

I am reconsidering this one because I did not have any idea on what to make for this. Sorry for the long intro, I was cooking with it

Art by inu-sama, their art is cool
creator: RandomGold
